scripts.name: zone_batch_generator.py
scripts.desc: Deterministic batch generator per zone with AQ seeds; fixed gate manifest recording (bug patch applied)

scripts.name: gate_sweep_zone4.py
scripts.desc: Gate sweep analysis for Zone 4 (BPM artifact observation)

scripts.desc: Gate sweep analysis for Zone 6 (failure pattern)

scripts.desc: Generate MIR feature snapshot across all zones

wiki.name: phase4.6_zone_mir_snapshot.json
wiki.desc: One-track MIR features per zone (sonic fingerprint)

wiki.name: path_c_bpm_artifact_research_brief.md
wiki.desc: Root cause analysis and remediation options

validation_matrix.note: N=100 tracks per zone, square waveform, full density, Phase 4.6 overrides, rhythm baseline forced

zone6.note: baseline required; high-BPM gates improve with baseline

path_c_findings.artifact: librosa.beat.beat_track selects false high-BPM (~165.44) instead of true 125 BPM
path_c_findings.root_cause: Square-wave arpeggio onset envelope has strong harmonics at double/triple tempo

gate_dependence.zone4: mostly robust — high-BPM tracks still classify as Zone 4 without baseline
gate_dependence.zone6: sensitive — most high-BPM tracks misclassify as Zone 1 without baseline

waveform_test.triangle: eliminates BPM artifact but breaks other features → not viable

path_c_findings.real_music_impact: None — BPM extracted reliably from real audio
remediation: Production: always use --force-rhythm-baseline for synthetic MOD classification
Future: Option A — onset envelope comb filtering to suppress false harmonics

key_decisions: Rhythm baseline is mandatory for synthetic MOD classification (Phase 4.6 invariant)
Zone 1 and Zone 2 overrides locked as v1.0; no further tuning needed
Path C artifact accepted as known limitation; not blocking production
Batch generator gate manifest bug fixed (was checking wrong attribute)
next_actions: Commit all new scripts and wiki to export repo (done: 08a4005)
Optionally run full N=200 validation sweep for final polish (not needed — N=100 is already conclusive)
If generating large batches, always invoke zone-validate.py for QA
